name: Azusa AVPlayer BVID Repro
description: Minimum AVPlayer BVID queue repro for Scripting on iPhone.

localizedDescriptions.en: A minimum AVPlayer repro that resolves a BVID, logs stream candidates, and plays the queue continuously.
localizedDescriptions.zh: 一个最小 AVPlayer 复现脚本：输入 BVID，打印音频候选地址并连续播放队列。
